sys_script_client.description:
- v 2.5.13
There is a bit going on here. The organizational contact allows contacts to be selected from the Sys_user table. If the user isn't in the sys user table, then the user can either be added to the External POC Info (which extends the Sys User table) or directly to the Sys_User table. Currently the user will be added to Sys_User, if the user has permission and it is an internal contact. If the user does not have permissions or it is an external contact, then the user will be added to the External POC Info table.
sys_script_client.name: Contact - onSubmit - save_contact
